name: Kyogen
description:
Kyogen: The Masks of Ten Crests

In feudal Japan, ten samurai clans forged their spirits into sacred Kamon: Tokugawa’s hollyhock, Minamoto’s bamboo-gentian, Taira’s butterfly, Takeda’s diamonds, Uesugi’s sparrows, Date’s bamboo, Shimazu’s cross, Oda’s quince, Toyotomi’s paulownia, and Hojo’s dragon scales. Each crest, a mask of wit and valor, captures human triumphs and follies. Now, reborn as 223 Ukiyo-e-inspired art on Bitcoin Ordinals, these Kyogen masks are airdropped to Ordinal trailblazers

No lords, only rebels fusing ancient art with blockchain.

Iku Zo! The eternal stage awaits.
